dialogue.speaker: Boba Jacobian
lines: Nyaanager runs a Westrum generative team. She doesn't call it that though. This is the way.

dialogue.speaker: Desi Goner
lines: The Boss from Team Inferno sent me here to finish up the critical user journeys for themes or something?
I asked all these people what the feature is and got 19.2 answers!

dialogue.speaker: Tenchi Reader
lines: We all love our work but we're having trouble with our velocity.
We recently split up some of the projects to work on more independently, so we could keep up with the incoming requests.
As Polly Math predicted, they just asked for more and more so we're all lonely and it's hard to help each other now.

dialogue.speaker: Courage
lines: Fixing the database schema was intense. Just thinking about it gives me cognitive zoomies!
It's a full moon, the sky is clear, and I love coding. We're writing Rust tonight boys. Awooooooo!

dialogue.speaker: Casey
lines: If you know who I am I don't know why you're surprised to find me here.

dialogue.speaker: doggo
lines: wan wan!

dialogue.speaker: Nanny Ogg Vorbis
lines: nothin' over 'ere cept broken dreams and burnouts
It's not that bad, I just haven't done anything with this part of the village yet :)

dialogue.speaker: Glenn Gary
lines: How am I supposed to sell this product when it keeps crashing in front of prospects!?
Inferno talks a big game but really their customers are stuck with us so they put up with it. Our reputation is not great.
The Disco geeks always deliver, eventually. They're never on time and releases are rough. They're always too busy to talk.
I hear the SREs are pretty good but I only know them from incidents, so it's hard for me to tell.
I talked to Mahogany peeps and they say everything is fine. It is in fact, not fine. Except for Marathon, I don't get it.

dialogue.speaker: Agi Lecoach
lines: I work with all the teams and it's unbelievable how different they are!
The brass hangs out in Mahogany Row. They act like they're the adults in the room but they're just people.
Our SREs call themselves Team Marathon. They built us one of the best platforms I've ever seen. And yet, we still have incidents.
Team Inferno usually delivers except most of the time it doesn't work right.
Team Disco tries so darn hard but their velocity is all over the place.

dialogue.speaker: Paws Alljohn
lines: GAME OVER MAN!
Haha not really. These folks have the best SREs and infrastructure money can buy, and they still have incidents!
My implants are all messed up so I need you to help these folks out with a retrospective. Get the story and show them the way.

dialogue.speaker: Johnny Mnemomena
lines: I never sleep anymore. No matter how many times I train these fools, they keep writing bugs!
Obviously this is proof that we need more training.

dialogue.speaker: Frau Barella
lines: The great style unification of 2021 is the greatest achievement of our career!
Customers still complain about usability. It's like. Our stuff is great, but it doesn't quite come to gether.
